title: PJM AS Market Results Real Time JSON API
description:
Real-time five-minute ancillary service prices and volumes for PJM. This includes *Regulation*, *Synchronized Reserves*, *Primary Reserves*, and *Thirty Minute Reserves*, and covers the entire RTO, Mid-Atlantic/Dominion (MAD), and Baltimore/Pepco/Dominion (BPD) locales.

This data series begins in the autumn of 2022, when PJM implemented Comprehensive Pricing Reform which altered price formation for reserves. For more on these changes, see [this article](https://insidelines.pjm.com/pjm-implements-reserve-price-formation-changes/) from PJM.
